## Top 3 Priorities Today

1. **Board: $5 CWS registration is now 41 days overdue.** This is no longer a scheduling issue — it is a signal about organizational execution. Register today. Pair with a one-page GitHub Pages or Notion privacy policy (2 hours of work). Submit to CWS tonight. CWS approval takes 1–7 days; each day of delay is a day of compounding unvalidated-assumption risk.

2. **Sideload to 3 people today — no board action required.** `premeet-intel/` is shippable. ZIP it, write two sentences of install instructions, DM three people with back-to-back Google Calendar meetings. This is the only action that can produce user signal before the board unblocks. 40 days without a single user is not acceptable.

3. **BrightData API key → close PRE-98 same day it arrives.** The only remaining code task is a one-line DB insert. Once the key lands, engineering can ship in under an hour. Keep that on standby.
